actions.recommended_change: Future strong decisions must be emitted by native pnva.event.v1 runtime rules such as adaptive_threshold, field_scheduler or etev_guard instead of legacy_observer.
actions.title: Replace H0 strong legacy decisions with native H2/H3 authority

actions.recommended_change: Strong influence edges should be covered by H2/H3/H4 rules; H0/H1 may remain contextual but not decisive.
actions.title: Migrate low-authority strong heuristic influence edges

actions.recommended_change: Future suppression events should carry calibrated gate_delta/threshold semantics so non-execution remains proof-backed and below-threshold in native scope.
actions.success_metric: above_threshold_suppression_count=0 for new native evidence and native_suppression_clean=true
actions.title: Re-emit above-threshold suppressions through native calibrated thresholds

actions.recommended_change: Runtime emitters should write schema_version, event_id, entity_id, causal_chain_id, decision, tension, heuristics and proof directly.
actions.success_metric: schema_contract warning_count=0 for new native packages
actions.title: Emit pnva.event.v1 directly instead of relying on bridge normalization

actions.recommended_change: Keep legacy trace debt visible, but use native H2/H3 traces as the forward path for every new production sample.
actions.success_metric: low_authority_trace_count=0 for new native packages and trace_coverage_ratio=1.0
actions.title: Reduce low-authority trace debt in public decision index

actions.recommended_change: Every future suppression/execution row should remain attributable to a cataloged entity and a hard-authority rule.
actions.success_metric: legacy_low_authority_warning_count=0 for new native packages and native_matrix_clean=true
actions.title: Keep entity no-tick migration debt bounded by actor

author: Gustavo de Aguiar Martins

interpretation.boundary: Counts are migration signals across overlapping reports; raw_migration_signal_count is not a de-duplicated event count.
interpretation.purpose: Turn PNVA R2 legacy debt into a measurable migration backlog for R3 readiness.
interpretation.sovereignty: A stronger PNVA release should expose not only what passes, but exactly what remains to become legacy-free.

recommendations: Treat R3-A1 as the release-critical migration target.
Do not erase legacy evidence; replace future runtime emissions with native H2/H3 authority.
Use this report as the engineering backlog before claiming R3_NATIVE_CLEAN_LEGACY_FREE.
